warnings: The scf_converged = True (SCF must converge for the energy/orbitals to be meaningful)

prose: The frontier-orbitals task on water using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase was performed. The method used is B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF. The HOMO-LUMO gap is 8.94067 eV (noting that SCF converged).
